title: Blades of Pride 03: Nonbinary Hand and a Half
description: The netherite sword always felt too cisgender to me so I made it trans and nonbinary.
body:
Howdy! This is a pretty simple resource pack, all it does is retexture the netherite sword to have a nonbinary pride flag themed color scheme!

I loosely based this texture on the hand and a half style of swords, mostly it was inspired by the master sword from zelda.

If you like this texture pack please consider buying me a tea on Ko-Fi!
